rationale: Review 1's sole finding rests on a claim that the PR description names `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` and promises to discharge a Mathlib TODO, but no such claim appears anywhere in the diff; acting on it would send the author chasing a fabricated problem. Review 2 correctly identifies that the new declarations (Inv, Group, CommGroup, mapValue) are absent from Mathlib and TauCeti and approves cleanly.
